content_body:
Established in 2013 by Candace, Crawford Collections is the result of years of hard work and hands-on experience working at the Atlanta Apparel Mart. Candace's genuine love for her customers is evident in the high level of personal service at her shop.

The airy, spacious interior is at once light and cozy, with plush seating for guests and an abundance of beautiful vintage chandeliers. Complimentary beverages indulge tired shoppers who need refreshment, and Candace herself can usually be found buzzing around the store, giving up-to-date style advice and directing visitors to the very best Blue Ridge attractions.

Stop by for a chat on your next visit to our gorgeous mountain town to go shopping in north Georgia.
title: Crawford Collections
